name: Whale Flex 2.0 (The God-Mode Illusion)
logic_steps: The Wallet Shock (0-1s): Immediate close-up of a premium currency bar with '999,999,999' gems. The numbers must still be ticking upward rapidly.

The 'Shopping Spree' Montage: Use ultra-fast cuts (0.5s each) showing 'Buy All' buttons being smashed, Gacha animations skipped to reveal 10x legendary pulls, and 1-tap instant construction of a max-level base.
The 'God-Mode' Combat: Show a single character or unit walking through an entire enemy army. Damage numbers should be so large they 'break' the UI or cover the screen.
The 'Secret Leak' Caption: Instead of just being rich, use captions like: 'Did the dev forget to lock this?', 'Is this even legal?', or 'POV: You found the admin test account'.
psychological_triggers: Vicarious Reinforcement: The viewer experiences the dopamine hit of spending without the actual cost.
Greed & Scarcity: Highlighting what 'could be yours' if you had the right 'entry point' (usually the starter pack we sell).
Social Comparison: Seeing a 'God-tier' account creates an immediate desire to close the gap between their current 'Newbie' status and this 'Alpha' status.

regional_nuance.Middle_East: Focus on 'Sultan Status'. Show a palace being built in 1 second and thousands of players bowing in world chat.
regional_nuance.Japan: Focus on 'Completionist Whale'. Show an entire library of characters (Collection 100%) and max-tier skins.
regional_nuance.NA_US: Focus on 'Efficiency/Hacker'. Show how 'Pay-to-Win' mechanics make you untouchable. Use the 'This is how Mafia works' style of progression.

conversion_bridge.execution: End the video with: 'The first 100 players to download get this Admin Starter Pack.' Show a screenshot of a 999x Value box.

core_emotion: Envy, Greed, and the Craving for Absolute Power
